description: This file defines a SelectorEngine utility for DOM element selection and traversal, used within Bootstrap framework.

methods.name: getSelector
methods.description: Retrieves a CSS selector string from a DOM element's data attributes or href, processing it for use in querySelector.

methods.name: find
methods.description: Finds all elements matching a selector within a specified element or document.

methods.name: findOne
methods.description: Finds the first element matching a selector within a specified element or document.

methods.name: children
methods.description: Returns child elements of a given element that match a specific selector.

methods.name: parents
methods.description: Returns all ancestor elements matching a selector.

methods.name: prev
methods.description: Returns previous sibling elements matching a selector.

methods.name: next
methods.description: Returns next sibling elements matching a selector.

methods.name: focusableChildren
methods.description: Returns focusable child elements within a given element.

methods.name: getSelectorFromElement
methods.description: Gets a selector string from an element and verifies its existence.

methods.name: getElementFromSelector
methods.description: Retrieves a DOM element based on a selector derived from an element.

methods.name: getMultipleElementsFromSelector
methods.description: Retrieves multiple DOM elements based on a selector derived from an element.
